## Skills Impact

If this PR changes skill packs, routing, prompts, safety metadata, or skill docs,

## Screenshots

For UI work, include screenshots or recordings with dummy/non-sensitive data only.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, local databases, personal data, private prompts, private file contents, or sensitive logs are included.
- [ ] Tests relevant to the changed area were run.
- [ ] Documentation reflects actual implemented behavior.
- [ ] For skill changes: the pack remains data-only unless explicitly authorized otherwise, and routing/safety fixtures were updated where applicable.
- [ ] For UI screenshots: only dummy/non-sensitive information is visible.
